chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Direct Offspring

text: 5609 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ مَاتَ وَ تَرَكَ اِبْنَتَهُ وَ أُخْتَهُ لِأَبِيهِ وَ أُمِّهِ فَقَالَ "اَلْمَالُ لِلاِبْنَةِ وَ لَيْسَ لِلْأُخْتِ مِنَ اَلْأَبِ وَ اَلْأُمِّ شَيْءٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5609 - It is narrated by Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub from Ali ibn Ri'ab from Zurara from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) regarding a man who passed away and left behind his daughter and his full sister (sister from his father and mother).
Imam (as) said: "The wealth belongs to the daughter, and the full sister has no share in it."
